source_name: Electric Vehicle Council - public charging infrastructure

fields.scope: Public charging count nationally, with breakdown by power class. Highway corridor coverage = % of national highway corridors with rapid chargers spaced <150 km.
fields.primary_source_document: Electric Vehicle Council, State of Electric Vehicles (annual). PlugShare and ChargeFox can be cross-references.
fields.keying_plan: Key the headline public charger count, fast and ultra-fast subsets, and chargers-per-1000-EVs ratio. Note that fleet uptake outpaces public charging in some states.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed public charger counts. By the mid-2020s Australia had ~3,500-4,500 public chargers with a fast-charger subset of ~700-900. Charger-to-EV ratio is a useful indicator of infrastructure adequacy.
citation: Electric Vehicle Council, State of Electric Vehicles.
